ideal_answer: Use City Campus contact details: 21-A Small Industrial Estate Shahabpura Road, phone +92 52 3241801-7, email info@skt.umt.edu.pk.
Iqbal Campus is at 2-KM Daska Road Sialkot. Call +92 52 3575234-36 or email info@skt.umt.edu.pk.
For Happiness Center support, email cc.center@umt.edu.pk. For latest process details, verify through official UMT channels.
For campus emergencies, contact OSS&V and call 15 or 1122 immediately.
If you are in immediate danger, call 15 or 1122 now and contact OSS&V. You can also reach Happiness Center at cc.center@umt.edu.pk after immediate safety action.
The LRC is listed as open 8am-9pm and Sunday 10am-5pm (verify latest timings through official channels).
Undergraduate borrowing policy in this corpus states up to 4 books for 14 days.
The handbook lists Tarbiyah Department in Section 20. For current offerings, confirm through official campus channels.
Students are required to check course registration on the portal after registration actions.
Semester unfreeze requests are submitted via Student Portal/PRS request system (or PRS help channels) before semester start timelines.
Probation policy describes warning/probation stages, advisor engagement, and progression reviews when CGPA remains below thresholds.
Quarterly fee due dates include 5th Sep, 5th Dec, 5th Mar, and 5th Jun.
If fee is not paid by due date, policy mentions PKR 3,000 plus PKR 100/day and exam ineligibility for defaulters.
Sessional evaluation is made available on participant Portal/Moodle at least one week before finals.
Final Transcript clearance starts from student portal dashboard FT Clearance tab and follows the listed online steps.
Authorized collection is allowed with required authority letter/CNIC documentation as stated in handbook extract.
Scholarship and financial aid policy is documented in handbook section/chunks under Scholarships and Financial Aid Policy.
Merit scholarship slabs are listed in handbook extracts (including percentage/CGPA tiers).
Kinship policy mentions tuition fee waiver for eligible kin categories of alumni/existing participants.
Remote area scholarship text mentions eligibility thresholds, required documents, and interview-based scrutiny.
Scholarship rules state discounts/waivers apply to tuition fee only, and admission/library fees are not refundable.
